raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX at approximately XXXX XXXX, I booked a flight through Citi XXXX using my Citi XXXX credit card. On XX/XX/XXXX at approximately XXXX XXXX  ( within XXXX hours ), I cancelled the ticket through Citi XXXX under the advertised 24-hour free cancellation policy. 

The cancellation was successful. XXXX XXXX confirmed that the ticket was cancelled and that a refund of {$100.00} was issued. Citi XXXX also showed the booking as cancelled. 

When the refund did not appear, I opened a billing dispute with Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX and provided : Screenshot of the 24-hour cancellation policy Proof of cancellation Confirmation of refund from the airline Despite this documentation, Citi denied the dispute stating I did not follow policy. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, after escalating, I was transferred to Citi XXXX customer service. A representative acknowledged an internal error and confirmed a refund of {$100.00} was issued on XX/XX/XXXX. I received email confirmation stating it could take up to 30 days to reflect. 

The refund never posted. 

In XX/XX/XXXX, I contacted Citi again and spent several hours explaining the case. I was told it would reflect soon. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, I called again. I was told the dispute would be reopened and I would receive the refund. On XX/XX/XXXX, I was notified that the claim was denied due to timeframe limitations. This timeframe issue resulted from Citis internal handling delays, not from any failure on my part. I initiated cancellation within 24 hours and filed my dispute promptly on XX/XX/XXXX. 
I have now spent approximately XXXX hours over three months attempting to resolve this issue. The repeated denial, inconsistent explanations, and failure to properly investigate a confirmed refund have caused significant stress, XXXX, and disruption to my work.
